# AuthToolkit Identity Starter

Project name: authtoolkit-identity-starter

Purpose: A beginner-friendly Next.js App Router starter that shows how to add AuthToolkit Identity to an app.

Core flow:
/ -> /login -> /auth/identity/start -> hosted AuthToolkit Identity -> /auth/identity/callback -> /app -> /logout

Important routes:
- /: landing page
- /login: sign-in page
- /auth/identity/start: redirects to hosted AuthToolkit Identity
- /auth/identity/callback: handles safe callback states and creates a minimal starter session when verified
- /app: protected starter app shell
- /logout: clears starter session

Important docs:
- README.md
- docs/integration-checklist.md
- docs/ai-customization-prompt.md
- docs/how-auth-flow-works.md
- docs/security-notes.md
- docs/customization-recipes.md

Safe customization areas:
- app/page.tsx
- app/login/page.tsx
- app/app/page.tsx
- app/globals.css
- README.md
- docs/

Dangerous areas not to modify casually:
- app/auth/identity/start/route.ts
- app/auth/identity/callback/route.ts
- src/lib/session.ts
- .env.example

Security reminders:
- Never expose server secrets in browser code.
- Never move server secrets into NEXT_PUBLIC_*.
- Do not remove callback safety states.
- Protect new app pages with getStarterSession().
